plugins.name: claude-wiki
plugins.description: Karpathy LLM Wiki pattern for Obsidian + Claude Cowork. JP default, EN fallback. Requires kepano/obsidian-skills (hard dependency). Pre-release: setup-claude-wiki + add-page + lint-vault + query-wiki shipped; .obsidian/ write-guard hook + 統合 dogfood follow before v0.1.0 stable cut.
